ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication where the article was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the article was published */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the article's image */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "reading_time" REAL /* Reading time of the article in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_publication FOREIGN KEY ("publication") REFERENCES publications ("publication_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the publication's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiments" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_entities" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., journalist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_article_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, like, comment) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_article_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_article_interactions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_recommendations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., popular topic, author productivity) */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., popularity score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_trends_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nlp_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "nlp_model" TEXT /* NLP model used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the NLP analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nlp_analysis_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage */,
  "user_engagement" REAL /* User engagement metric (e.g., time on site, pages per session) */,
  "article_views" INTEGER /* Number of article views */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-author, editor) */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
column_names: Publication where the article was published
ID of the author who wrote the article
Reading time of the article in minutes
URL of the author's profile picture
Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location)
Role of the user (e.g., journalist, analyst, admin)
URL of the user's profile picture
Type of interaction (e.g., view, like, comment)
Type of trend (e.g., popular topic, author productivity)
Value of the trend (e.g., popularity score)
NLP model used for the analysis
